offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 clients/month, inaccurate quarterly estimated tax payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate tax calculations instead of manual calculations using spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try a simple interface for client data input
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for clients
Enable CSV import for existing client data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
